signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Access protected actions and your account session.
signIn.alreadySignedIn: You are already signed in. Redirecting now…
signIn.protectedRedirectHint: Please sign in to access that page. You'll return there after login.
signIn.socialLinkRequiredHint: An account already exists for {{email}}. Sign in with your existing credentials to confirm linking your {{provider}} account.
signIn.passwordResetRequiredHint: This account ({{email}}) requires a password reset before you can sign in or link with {{provider}}.

dialog.title: Sign in
dialog.subtitle: Access protected actions and your account session.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Create your local email/password account. You will be signed in immediately and can verify your email from the banner.
register.successFallback: Account created. Please verify your email.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.tokenMissing: Verification token is missing or invalid.

restoreAccess.title: Restore access
restoreAccess.subtitleWithToken: Set your new password to complete access recovery.
restoreAccess.subtitleWithoutToken: Request a password-reset link for your account email.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Update your password for your current account.
